CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, x FLOAT, y FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 2.0, 4.0), (2, 3.0, NULL), (3, NULL, 6.0), (4, 5.0, 8.0);
SELECT regr_avgx(y, x) FROM test_data WHERE y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT regr_avgx(y, x) AS avg_x FROM (SELECT x, y FROM test_data WHERE x IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_data;
CREATE TABLE other_data (category VARCHAR, value FLOAT);
SELECT regr_avgx(td.y, td.x) FROM test_data td JOIN other_data od ON td.id = od.category WHERE od.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT regr_avgx(y, x) FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE x > 2);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (value FLOAT, group_id INTEGER);
SELECT regr_avgx(a.value, b.x) FROM additional_data a JOIN test_data b ON a.group_id = b.id WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL;
WITH filtered_test AS (SELECT x, y FROM test_data WHERE y IS NOT NULL) SELECT regr_avgx(y, x) FROM filtered_test;
SELECT regr_avgx(y, x) FROM test_data WHERE x IS NOT NULL AND y IS NOT NULL;
